data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for appliance installation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of multiple functionalities related to appliance installation, including signature capture, photo documentation, and payment processing. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that demonstrate these functionalities, leading to an inability to confirm or deny the requirement's satisfaction. Prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga but do not address the specific needs outlined in the linked use case, indicating a gap in coverage.
gaps: No evidence of signature capture functionality or related API endpoints.
No evidence of photo documentation linked to signature functionality or related API endpoints.
No evidence of payment processing linked to signature confirmation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for signature capture
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the signature capture requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for photo documentation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the photo documentation requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for payment processing
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the payment processing requirement.
